physical_transformation.description: Moved up to Lightweight for title opportunities after clearing out Featherweight division
physical_transformation.power_at_155: Moderate - less KO power than at 145

physical_transformation.description: Moved up to Lightweight in 2017, found significant success with improved strength and cardio
physical_transformation.power_at_155: High - maintained submission threat while improving striking

physical_transformation.description: Consistent Middleweight, no significant weight class changes
physical_transformation.power_at_185: Moderate - volume striker with good cardio

reinier_de_ridder.name: Reinier de Ridder

physical_transformation.description: Moved down to Middleweight after UFC 326 loss. Former ONE Championship double champion (MW + LHW)
physical_transformation.power_at_185: Moderate - grappling focused, cardio concerns at weight cut

reinier_de_ridder.post_ufc_326: Announced plans to move to 205 lbs after consecutive UFC defeats

physical_transformation.description: Long-time Bantamweight, excellent boxing, struggles with wrestlers
physical_transformation.power_at_135: High - one of the best boxers in division

physical_transformation.description: Young prospect, still developing physically at 20 years old
Consistent Bantamweight, fought at 135 lbs throughout career
physical_transformation.power_at_135: Moderate - submission specialist, limited striking power

key_insights.weight_differential: Holloway moved up (+10 lbs), de Ridder moved down (-20 lbs from LHW)
key_insights.physical_advantage: Oliveira has natural size advantage at 155, Holloway is smaller for the division
key_insights.cut_difficulty: de Ridder's move to 185 may have impacted performance; announced return to 205 after UFC 326
